intro: Two technical steps separate your house from the Cultural Data Space. We accompany both.

steps.title: Implement the JSON interface
steps.body: We review your CMS or programme system and develop the adapter that exposes your data as a standardised JSON interface. The frontend stays unchanged.

steps.title: Connect to the data-space connector
steps.body: The connector handles authentication and data transfer into the Cultural Data Space. You keep data sovereignty – you decide what who is allowed to see.

mapPlaceholder.heading: Pilot theatres & partners
mapPlaceholder.body: An interactive map of Germany with all pilot theatres and data space partners is coming in milestone 5. Until then: give us a call, we'll tell you who is already involved.
